infobox.value: ([Chinese](/wiki/Chinese_language "Chinese language"): 东钱湖) is a large freshwater [lake](/wiki/Lake "Lake") in [Yinzhou District, Ningbo](/wiki/Yinzhou_District,_Ningbo "Yinzhou District, Ningbo") in [Zhejiang](/wiki/Zhejiang "Zhejiang"), [China](/wiki/China "China"). It has a surface area of 20 square kilometres (7.7 sq mi).[[1]](#cite_note-1)

Lake in Ningbo, China

| Dongqian Lake | |
| --- | --- |
| Dongqian Lake is a long established scenic destination in China | |
| [Dongqian Lake is located in Zhejiang](/wiki/File:Map_Zhejiang_adm.png "Dongqian Lake is located in Zhejiang") Dongqian Lake  Dongqian Lake | |
| Location | [Yinzhou District, Ningbo](/wiki/Yinzhou_District,_Ningbo "Yinzhou District, Ningbo"), [Zhejiang](/wiki/Zhejiang "Zhejiang") |
| Coordinates | [29°46′00″N 121°40′01″E﻿ / ﻿29.7667°N 121.667°E﻿ / 29.7667; 121.667](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Dongqian_Lake&params=29.7667_N_121.667_E_source:kolossus-zhwiki_type:waterbody) |
| [Basin](/wiki/Drainage_basin "Drainage basin") countries | China |
|  | |
| Surface area | 20 km2 (7.7 sq mi) |

**Dongqian Lake** ([Chinese](/wiki/Chinese_language "Chinese language"): 东钱湖) is a large freshwater [lake](/wiki/Lake "Lake") in [Yinzhou District, Ningbo](/wiki/Yinzhou_District,_Ningbo "Yinzhou District, Ningbo") in [Zhejiang](/wiki/Zhejiang "Zhejiang"), [China](/wiki/China "China"). It has a surface area of 20 square kilometres (7.7 sq mi).[[1]](#cite_note-1)
